features.name: Tab navigation between all 5 pages
Home page hero with AIPS branding and CTA
Submit form with Idea/MVP toggle
Form fields: name, problem, solution, targetUser, mvpScope, roles, email
MVP-only fields: demo link, video link
Form validation before submit
Save submission to localStorage with pending status
Admin tab hidden unless #admin=aips2026 in URL
Admin view lists pending submissions
Admin can score each criteria 0-20 with sliders/inputs
Admin can add written feedback
Score 60+ auto-publishes to board
Score <60 returns with feedback
My Submissions tab: lookup by email shows status and scores
Revision flow: student can edit and resubmit rejected projects
Board displays approved projects as cards
Card shows: name, pitch, stage tag, score badge, roles needed
Filter by stage: All/Idea/MVP
Filter by role needed
Click card expands to full detail view
MVP projects show demo link and embedded video
Home page shows live stats (total projects, contributors)
Join button on project detail opens player card creator
Player card form: name, degree+year, role, superpower, email
Self-rated abilities: 5-axis radar chart (Coding, Design, Research, Communication, Domain)
Radar chart renders correctly with SVG or Canvas
Player card saved to project in localStorage
Project detail shows list of player cards from interested people
Player card displays as a styled trading card
Mobile responsive layout
Clean Apple white/grey UI throughout
Smooth tab transitions
Empty states for board and submissions
Success/error feedback on form actions
